title: Ansible Fork and Timeout Saturation on Controller
dataSources: Ansible controller daemon logs (`ansible:log`) or aggregated result events
app: AWX task container `/var/log/ansible.log` or stdout capture
spl:
index=iac sourcetype="ansible:log" OR sourcetype="ansible:result"
| search "Timeout" OR "Timeout (12s)" OR "forks" OR "strategy"
| stats count by host, playbook
| where count>=15
| sort -count
description: Strategy timeouts and fork exhaustion slow enterprise batch remediations.
value: Shows when controller tuning (forks, timeout, fact gathering) needs adjustment.
implementation: Correlate with CPU load on execution nodes; split inventories if patterns persist.
visualization: Bar chart (timeouts by playbook), Table (controller host).

references.title: AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)

knownFalsePositives: Alerts from scheduled scans, pilot repositories, or vendor API throttling during bulk operations.
grandmaExplanation: We watch infrastructure-as-code runs and policy so changes to systems stay visible and governed.
